title: "Super ZSNES" is a stab at a modern SNES emulator from the original developers
description: Upgrades to SNES graphics and sound go way beyond the typical screen filtering.

title: China kills Meta’s acquisition of Manus as US-China AI rivalry deepens
description: The unwinding of Meta’s deal shows how tech founders struggle to cut China ties.

title: Study: Infrasound likely a key factor in alleged hauntings
description: Low-frequency infrasound (below 20 Hz) can raise cortisol levels in saliva and increase irritability.

title: OpenAI ends Microsoft legal peril over its $50B Amazon deal
description: OpenAI has won major concessions from its largest shareholder, Microsoft, that will allow it to sell products on AWS, while Microsoft get more cash in a revenue-share agreement.

description: Valve's new hardware is solid but might not justify its $99 price.

title: DeepMind’s David Silver just raised $1.1B to build an AI that learns without human data
description: Ineffable Intelligence, a British AI lab founded a mere few months ago by former DeepMind researcher David Silver, has raised $1.1 billion in funding at a valuation of $5.1 billion.

title: Investors back Skye’s AI home screen app for iPhone ahead of launch
description: Skye's new AI app attracted investors before it even launched — a sign of interest in a more AI-aware iPhone.

title: National Science Board eviscerated; Trump admin fires all 22 members
description: Members had planned to release report that US is ceding scientific ground to China.

description: The phone could go into mass production in 2028, an analyst says.
